properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins or origin patterns.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used in email templates and links.

properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Default admin account email created on startup.

properties.name: app.admin.password
properties.description: Default admin account password created on startup.

properties.name: app.jwt.access-expiration
properties.description: Access token expiration duration in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-expiration-days
properties.description: Refresh token expiration duration in days.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-cookie-name
properties.description: HTTP cookie name used to store refresh token.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-cookie-max-age-days
properties.description: Refresh token cookie max age in days.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-cookie-secure
properties.description: Whether refresh token cookie should be marked Secure.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-cookie-same-site
properties.description: SameSite attribute for refresh token cookie (None, Lax, Strict).

properties.name: app.auth.google.allowed-client-ids
properties.description: Comma-separated Google OAuth client IDs allowed for token verification.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name used for media uploads.

properties.name: cloudinary.api-key
properties.description: Cloudinary API key used for media uploads.

properties.name: cloudinary.api-secret
properties.description: Cloudinary API secret used for media uploads.
